task: T-06 Existing Daily Report / Ops Report Audit

existing_files_found.purpose: Core daily report generator. Integrates MarketRegimeEngine, StrategyScreenEngine, signal reliability, topic/theme engines.
existing_files_found.notes: Has `marketSummary.regime` (TS engine, not P4-03). No walk-forward section. Has `recommendationBucket` field (candidate-level, not a buy/sell signal).

existing_files_found.purpose: Creates daily snapshots via prisma. Upserts MarketSnapshot, CandidateSnapshot, WatchlistSnapshot.
existing_files_found.notes: Has DB writes (prisma.create/upsert). T-06 Python builder must NOT touch these tables.

existing_files_found.purpose: REST GET endpoint for daily report. Calls generateDailyReport(). Cached 300s.
existing_files_found.notes: T-06 output can be added as a new section to this endpoint later.

existing_files_found.purpose: Daily report UI page. Fetches from /api/report/daily.
existing_files_found.notes: No walk-forward or regime-aware section yet.

existing_files_found.purpose: P4-03 PIT-safe regime classifier. Source of regime output.
existing_files_found.notes: T-06 consumes its output artifacts, not the script directly.

existing_files_found.purpose: T-05 portfolio walk-forward skeleton. Source of walk-forward output.
Displays fundamental observation summary in UI.
existing_files_found.notes: Pattern reference for new UI section if needed.

existing_modules_summary.daily_snapshot_engine: ACTIVE (TypeScript, has DB writes via prisma)
existing_modules_summary.python_daily_report: NONE (T-06 creates first Python daily report builder)

reusable_components: PIT-safe date query pattern from build-portfolio-walk-forward-skeleton.py
reference_only: DailyReportEngine.ts (TypeScript, add Python complement as new section)
pit_safety_concerns: DailySnapshotEngine writes snapshots - T-06 must NOT write to same tables
TS MarketRegimeEngine uses full lookback (may have lookahead risk in some modes)
production_write_risk: LOW for T-06 Python builder (read-only design)
decision: CREATE_NEW_PYTHON_BUILDER - no existing Python daily report; T-06 creates standalone artifact
